all_text_content:
Verse of the Day
Therefore shall ye observe all my statutes, and all my judgments, and do them: I am the Lord.
Leviticus 19:37
Quote of the Day
"When we take upon ourselves the name of Jesus Christ, we link our name with His. We identify with Him."
Elder Dale G. Renlund | 1 Oct 2025General Conference
